origin: Spun out of LIR-007 during the full-corpus GPU embedding run: the build embeds ALL hierarchical chunk levels, not just leaves.
summary: Confirmed bug in OUR build code (not the splitter): _embed_pass.flush() embeds every node returned by HierarchicalNodeParser instead of only leaf chunks. Splitter emitting all levels is correct/by-design. Fix = embed leaves only; parents stay stored (text only) for small-to-big merge-up.
